div.h1: Alignment at Base and Block Boundaries

p.strong: Why aligned base alone is insufficient

ol.li: Block size is a multiple of max_align_t If either fails, some blocks will be misaligned.

div.p: This rounds size UP to the next alignment boundary.
block_size = 64 (16×4) Block 0: 0x1000 ✓ Block 1: 0x1040 ✓ Block 2: 0x1080 ✓ ALL blocks aligned!
block_size = 24 (NOT 16 multiple) Block 0: 0x1000 ✓ Block 1: 0x1018 ✗ 0x1018 % 16 = 8 MISALIGNED! Block 2: 0x1030 ✓

text.tspan: Each column represents a 16-byte aligned boundary
Only addresses at column starts are properly aligned
